description: A ground-level photograph illustrating an area classified as 'Low density urban fabric' (Imperviousness Density (IM.D) less than 30%), taken in Täby, Sweden. The image shows a heart-shaped swimming pool with blue water and steps, surrounded by a light-coloured paved patio. This artificial surface is set within a large, manicured green lawn. In the background, several white residential buildings with red-tiled roofs are visible, alongside palm trees and other green vegetation. The scene combines artificial elements with predominant green spaces, fitting the description of low-density urban fabric where vegetated areas are significant and soil sealing is below 30%.
